text: Integrate video generation (Veo 3.1 or Runway Gen-3)
description:
Current: Mock files with dummy text
Vision: Cinematic vertical videos for Instagram Reels/TikTok

Options:
- Veo 3.1 (Google, waitlist, best for sci-fi aesthetic)
- Runway Gen-3 (available now, $95/month unlimited)
- Luma Dream Machine ($29/month)

Implementation: ~8-16 hours
- API integration
- Prompt engineering for Felix's aesthetic (sci-fi/philosophy)
- Asset management (videos are large)
- Fallback handling

This completes the Echo product vision (journal → video)
